task.title: Define and validate versioned development records
task.objective: Reject malformed, unsafe, or internally inconsistent development evidence with deterministic diagnostics
acceptance_criteria: Semantic validation reports every issue in stable order
The CLI distinguishes invalid records from unreadable or malformed input

attempts.summary: Implemented the typed schema and semantic validator
attempts.diagnostic: Independent review found repository paths accepted parent traversal and Windows-style absolute paths

attempts.summary: Added cross-platform absolute-path and parent-component rejection with regression tests

outcome.summary: vela-dev validates schema-versioned records and emits stable machine-searchable diagnostics

lessons: Security-sensitive path validation must account for both Unix and Windows syntax
Collect semantic issues instead of failing fast so one review exposes the complete correction set
